classFeaturePrimary.title: Spellcasting
classFeaturePrimary.description: Intelligence is your spellcasting ability. Spell save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + INT modifier. Spell attack modifier = proficiency bonus + INT modifier. You can prepare a number of spells equal to your INT modifier + Wizard level. You can cast prepared spells using spell slots.

classFeatureSecondary.title: Arcane Recovery
classFeatureSecondary.description: Once per day when you finish a short rest, you can recover expended spell slots. The slots can have a combined level equal to or less than half your Wizard level (rounded up), and none of the slots can be 6th level or higher.
